name: Gooey Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolate and butter with half-and-half, corn syrup, and salt in a heavy 2-quart saucepan over low heat, stirring until smooth.
2. Remove from heat; let stand for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in vanilla.
4. Serve warm or pour into clean glass jars and seal tightly.
5. Store up to 6 months in the refrigerator. Reheat sauce in a double boiler over hot (not boiling) water before serving, if desired.
Makes about 1 1/2 cups of sauce.
